caption: A man with unique, tall, greyish-blonde hair is seen recording a podcast in an indoor setting. He is wearing glasses, black headphones, a white button-down shirt, and a red bow tie. He sits before a black professional microphone on a stand. In the background, another person wearing a green dress is partially visible. The room is decorated with posters, including one that says "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and another featuring a stylized yellow shield icon. On-screen graphics appear on both sides of the frame, featuring a logo with the text "TALK PODCAST" on the left and "SS TALK 101" on the right. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks and gestures with his right hand, moving it slightly while maintaining his position in front of the microphone.
